creator: goatshit54108@national.shitposting.agency
text: `newfs -R` has the purpose of enforcing reproducible output, i.e. to be independent of time or random seeds. However, it is incomplete, because sbput(3) writes a fresh time() sample into the `struct fs` variable: see ffs_sbput() in sys/ufs/ffs/ffs_subr.c.
